name: worthwhile-zhidang-demo
description: 值当 (Worthwhile) — a spend-planning & value-attribution layer for autonomous, pay-per-call AI agents: before paying, pick the cheapest sources that are good-enough (dedup + stop at good-enough); after paying, produce an itemized, value-attributed receipt (worth / redundant / wasted) vs a greedy baseline. Static frontend demo (mock data, real planning logic).
